description: Review of quantum physics; introduction to particles, antiparticles and fundamental interactions; detectors and accelerators; symmetries and conservation laws; electroweak and color interactions of quarks and leptons; unification theories.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: PHYSICS 448or concurrent enrollment,PHYSICS 531or concurrent enrollment, or graduate/professional or special student standing
